Home Buying Guides The Locker Room Ordering Experience You’ve Been Waiting For
Buying Guides July 19, 2025

The Locker Room Ordering Experience You’ve Been Waiting For

Locker Rooms Should Inspire, Not Stress You Out

Upgrading or building locker rooms shouldn’t feel like an endless maze of quotes, confusion, and back-and-forth emails. Whether you’re a coach, athletic director, or team manager, you want quality sports lockers that reflect the pride and professionalism of your program — without the stress.

The problem? Most vendors make it harder than it has to be.

The Locker Room Ordering Experience You’ve Been Waiting For

We’ve spent over 30 years helping teams across North America design and install locker rooms that motivate athletes and impress recruits. Our custom wood lockers are built for performance, durability, and team pride — all delivered with a smooth, step-by-step process.

From football lockers to soccer lockers, our systems are designed to fit your layout, timeline, and budget.

Here’s How We Make Custom Locker Rooms Easy

Whether you’re furnishing a college weight room, hockey training facility, or high school athletic wing, we keep it simple.

✅ Step 1: Tell Us About Your Space

Just send us your dimensions, number of lockers, sport, and any special needs (helmet shelves, name plates, lock boxes, etc.).

✅ Step 2: Review Locker Styles

We’ll send mockups and options for our most popular models — including football lockers, wood lockers, and specialty storage like hockey stick racks.

✅ Step 3: Get Your Estimate

You’ll receive a detailed quote including lead time, materials, shipping, and any custom features.

✅ Step 4: Approve & Build

Once approved, we start crafting your lockers using top-grade birch or maple wood. Everything is made to last — and look great doing it.

✅ Step 5: We Ship Anywhere in North America

We coordinate freight and delivery to ensure your locker room project stays on track.

Why Teams Choose Our Lockers for Their Locker Rooms

  • Real wood lockers, not cheap particleboard

  • Custom-fit solutions for every sport and space

  • Proven durability in pro and collegiate environments

  • Fast lead times and responsive customer service

  • Shipping across the U.S. and Canada

From start to finish, we make locker room upgrades hassle-free — so you can focus on what matters most: building champions.

Ready to Transform Your Locker Room?

Stop digging through outdated catalogs or chasing vendors who don’t understand your sport. We’ve got the lockers for sale, the experience, and the passion to make your locker room project a success.

👉 Contact us today to get your free custom estimate — no pressure, just pro-level service and results.

The author PlayerStall

PlayerStall has been building custom wood sports lockers for collegiate and professional teams for over 30 years. Canadian-owned and operated since 1996, we offer a five year guarantee on all of our products.
